sections.heading: Sector 1
sections.body:
After the long DRS front straight, brake hard at around the 100m board, down to 4th gear. Hug the inside curb on turn one, then shift direction quickly into turn 2. Use a healthy amount of both curbs — but not too much, or you will lose a lot of the aero stability. Get on the throttle early to carry momentum into the short straight. Good rotation here sets the tone for the entire lap.

Brake just before the 50m board, drop to 4th or 3rd gear, and commit to an aggressive line over the Turn 3 apex. Immediately switch to Turn 4 — the inside curb is high, so ride it with caution. Power out cleanly, using the exit curb but avoiding the grass. This is a rhythm section — think smooth, not scrappy.

Turn one into turn two

sections.heading: Sector 2
sections.body:
One of Imolas best overtaking spots. Brake hard uphill, around the 50m board, and shift to 2nd gear. Aim for a late apex — the uphill camber helps the car rotate more effectively. Get back on throttle early, as the exit is forgiving and sets up a climb toward Piratella. Good traction is key, especially in race conditions.

Blind and fast. Stay left, then lift or tap the brakes before flicking right into 4th or 5th gear. Use a generous amount of the inside curb — but not too much to unsettle the rear. Track drops off quickly on exit, so be ready to catch any oversteer. Maximise speed on exit for the downhill sprint.

The turn seven hairpin

Brake while the car is still loaded from the descent. Turn 7 is the first right shift to 4th gear, roll into the corner, then immediately brake again for Turn 8, the tighter right-hander taken in 3rd gear. Stay off the high inside curbs. Be gentle on the throttle on exit; rear traction is tricky here. This complex is a lap killer if rushed — patience pays off!

sections.heading: Sector 3
sections.body:
Brake hard around the 50m board, drop to 3rd or 2nd gear, and launch over the tall curbs through this tight right-left. Attack the first curb hard, but modulate the throttle through the second to avoid spinning the tyres unnecessarily. Use the exit curb if necessary, but ensure you dont lose traction. It is easy to get a lot of wheelspin here, especially with low rear downforce setups that many players use at Imola.

One of the most technical and vital sequences. Brake hard downhill into Turn 11 (Rivazza 1), shifting to 2nd gear, and turn in late to square off the corner. Use the inside curb slightly. Run the car wide briefly, then immediately reposition left to enter Turn 12 (Rivazza 2). This is your final corner before the straight, so focus on getting a clean and early throttle application. The exit curb is usable, but be cautious with track limits. 

The final chicane sequence at the start of sector three

The final bend before the main straight is flat-out. Open DRS as soon as youre through. The straight is slightly curved, so stay to the right to set up turn one on the next lap.
